@graph.name: Exterior Trim Installation - Capitol Improvements
@graph.description: Professional exterior trim installation and replacement in Maryland, DC, and Virginia. Fascia boards, soffit, rake boards, corner boards, window trim, and frieze boards in wood, PVC, and composite.

itemOffered.name: Fascia Board Replacement
itemOffered.description: Rotted or damaged fascia board replacement in wood, PVC, or composite.

itemOffered.name: Soffit Installation & Replacement
itemOffered.description: Vented and non-vented soffit panels to protect the underside of your roof overhang.

itemOffered.name: Rake Board Replacement
itemOffered.description: Sloped trim boards along gable ends.

itemOffered.name: Corner Board Installation
itemOffered.description: Vertical corner boards in PVC or wood to frame corners and protect siding edges.

itemOffered.name: Window & Door Trim
itemOffered.description: Exterior casing, brickmold, and surround trim around windows and doors.

itemOffered.name: Frieze Board Installation
itemOffered.description: Horizontal trim board between siding and soffit.
